name: dashboard-core
description: Shared core for the value-chain research dashboards (software-supply-chain, ai-supply-chain, semi-equipment). Express + Yahoo proxy, client assets, price-refresh CLI.

scripts.test: node --check index.js && node --check server/index.js && node --check server/helpers.js && node --check server/cache.js && node --check server/yahoo.js && node --check bin/update-prices.js && node --check lib/update-prices/index.js && echo 'all syntax checks passed'

author: Ryan Cheung
